description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a dark finish and a prominent grain pattern. The handle transitions into a black, wedge-shaped metal head with a single sharp cutting edge and a flat poll on the opposite side. The blade is broad and slightly flared, designed for efficient chopping or splitting. The mounting between the handle and the blade appears seamless and sturdy, suggesting a traditional wedged fit. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or branding. The axe is sized for one-handed use, making it suitable for tasks such as chopping wood or clearing brush in urban parks or residential yards.
description: A hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a black, wedge-shaped metal blade, designed for chopping or splitting tasks. The design is functional and sturdy, with no visible branding or decorative features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved wooden handle and the broad, black metal blade with a sharp edge.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the narrow profile of the blade and handle, emphasizing the thinness of the cutting edge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle's curvature and the flat poll of the axe head.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view showing the handle's width and the alignment of the blade with the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a smooth, ergonomic grip and oval cross-section; dark finish.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wedge-shaped steel blade with a flat poll and broad cutting edge; no beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged fit between blade and handle.
